scripts.deploy: npm run build && npm run build:browser-runtime-layer && sst deploy --stage develop --config infra/sst.config.ts
scripts.local:deps: npm run build --workspace @lambda-batch-playground/libs-browser && npm run build --workspace @lambda-batch-playground/libs && npm run build --workspace @lambda-batch-playground/integration-discord && npm run build --workspace @lambda-batch-playground/repositories
scripts.local:batch-playground: npm run local:deps && npm --workspace @lambda-batch-playground/batch-playground run local
scripts.local:batch-anime-analysis: npm run local:deps && npm --workspace @lambda-batch-playground/batch-anime-analysis run local
scripts.validate: npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run test
